src/main/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Moved the controller mapping from /api to /api/currentUser to align with the new endpoint structure.
Changed the authorization check from a custom SpEL expression to the standard hasRole method.
Updated the endpoint to return a CurrentUser object instead of a User entity.
Adjusted the GET mapping to the root of the controller path since the controller path was updated.

src/test/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Rename the mock field and its associated method call to align with updated service interface naming conventions.
src/test/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.human_impl: Changed field from 'currentUser' to 'currentUserService' and method call from 'get()' to 'getUser()'.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent to 2.6.2 to align with Java 17 support requirements.
Configure the Maven compiler to target Java 17.
Update spring-cloud-gateway-mvc to 3.1.0 for compatibility with the new Spring Boot version.
